caption.en: Hello, I?셫 Junyeop Kim, working under the name ?뫒?뫅?뫕?뫚???뫇?뫔??. The name began with ??span class="hunmin">留듭떆,??a native Korean word capturing the essence of form, style, and a quiet yet undeniable presence. To this, ?쒚쓳ゐ쓳띱쓵??adds a layer of gentle restraint?봞 choice to remain reserved, never revealing everything all at once. The landing image reflects the same sensibility: technology with power, held quietly enough to make room for life. Together, ?뫒?뫅?뫕?뫚???뫇?뫔?? became a name for visual works, unfinished thoughts, and questions that are still taking shape.
